title: AlexNet Wins ImageNet 2012
description: While technically from 2012, AlexNet's impact was fully realized in 2013. The convolutional neural network achieved a top-5 error rate of 15.3% in ImageNet 2012, beating the next best entry by over 10 percentage points. This triggered the deep learning revolution in computer vision.
highlights: First use of ReLU activation in deep networks
Kickstarted the modern deep learning era
